title: What Mod
description: The What Mod is an innovative entertainment mod designed specifically for Minecraft. This mod allows players to trigger a unique GUI interface by pressing a custom hotkey, accompanied by playful audio.
body:
What Mod  
Introduction  
The What Mod is an innovative entertainment mod designed specifically for Minecraft. This mod allows players to trigger a unique GUI interface by pressing a hotkey, accompanied by playful audio.

Features
> Custom GUI Interface: Upon pressing the hotkey, a custom GUI interface displaying fun images will appear.  
> Audio Playback: During the display of the GUI interface, specific fun audio will play to entertain the players.  
> Hotkey Support: Quickly trigger the GUI interface and audio playback using a hotkey.

Installation Guide
1. Download and install the Fabric API.
2. Place the What Mod file into the Minecraft mods folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and ensure the What Mod is loaded.

Usage
1. Launch Minecraft and enter the game.
2. Use the default hotkey H (or customize it as needed) to trigger the What Mod features.
3. Enjoy fun images and audio playback on your screen.

Notes
Ensure your Minecraft version is compatible with the What Mod.

If you encounter any issues or need assistance, please visit our GitHub page

What 模组  
模组简介  
What 模组是一个专为 Minecraft 设计的创新娱乐模组。该模组允许玩家通过按下快捷键来触发独特的 GUI 界面，同时播放趣味音频。

功能特性
> 自定义 GUI 界面：玩家按下快捷键后，将会显示一个包含有趣图片的自定义 GUI 界面。  
> 音频播放：在 GUI 界面显示期间，将播放指定的趣味音频，为玩家带来更多乐趣。  
> 快捷键支持：可以通过快捷键快速触发 GUI 界面和音频播放。  

安装指南
1. 下载并安装 Fabric API。  
2. 将 What 模组文件放入 Minecraft 的 mods 文件夹。  
3. 启动 Minecraft 并确保加载了 What 模组。  

使用方法
1. 启动 Minecraft 并进入游戏。  
2. 使用默认快捷键 H（或根据需要自定义快捷键）来触发 What 模组的功能。  
3. 在屏幕上看到有趣的图片展示，并享受音频播放带来的乐趣。  

注意事项
确保你的 Minecraft 版本与 What 模组兼容。

如果遇到问题或需要帮助，请访问我们的 GitHub 页面。
